name: revit_create_foundation_slab
description: Creates a foundation slab from a boundary, level, and slab type.

boundary_curve_ids.description: Model curve or edge element ids defining the slab boundary

level_id.description: Level element id for the slab

slab_type_id.description: FloorType or foundation slab type element id

notes: Extract slab creation from FoundationSlabForm/SlabData handlers.
